name: offside-labs-studio
description: Offside Studio Suite monorepo. CRM is product #1; Crunch / Design / Director follow.

scripts.backend:migrate: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web python manage.py migrate
scripts.backend:makemigrations: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web python manage.py makemigrations
scripts.backend:shell: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web python manage.py shell_plus
scripts.backend:createsuperuser: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web python manage.py createsuperuser
scripts.backend:test: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web pytest
scripts.backend:ping: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec web python -c "from offside_crm.celery import ping; r = ping.delay(); print(r.get(timeout=5))"
